name: Chocolate Oatrage Snack Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine butter, oats, flour, brown sugar, eggs, walnuts, and vanilla.
2. Beat the mixture for 3 minutes at medium speed or until it is light and fluffy.
3. Stir in 1 cup of chocolate chips.
4. Pour the batter into an 8-inch square microwave-safe baking dish and cover with wax paper.
5. Cook on HIGH power for 4 minutes, then rotate the dish 1/4 turn.
6. Continue cooking on HIGH power for 4-5 more minutes, or until the top of the cake appears dry and the bottom is evenly colored.
7. Sprinkle the remaining 1 cup chocolate chips over the warm cake.
8. Let the cake stand for 10 minutes before spreading the chocolate evenly over it.
9. Cool the cake directly on the counter top.
10. Cut into serving pieces.
